topbarActionsToolbarAria: Actions toolbar: files, tools, and help
topbarEnginePathsTitle: Point the app to custom tool locations if you do not want the bundled copies or auto-discovery.
topbarOpenSettingsTitle: Open application settings: language, engine paths, diagnostics, and service preferences.
topbarEnginesDownloadTitle: Download missing built-in tools into your user app folder — handy on a fresh machine.
topbarExportCancelTitle: Stop the current save job; any partial output is removed. The source file on disk stays untouched.
topbarExtractFramesTitle: Extract a frame series (default 2 s interval; adjust in the ffmpeg panel)
topbarHeaderAria: Top bar: workspace tabs and actions
topbarInspectorTitle: Open the embedded inspector surface: full ffprobe summary, tracks, chapters, raw JSON, and TXT/HTML export for the current media.
topbarOpenFileTitle: Pick a video from your PC — it appears in the preview and timeline for trimming and export.
topbarOpenVideoFolderTitle: Pick a folder — the first video found is opened in preview (same scan as batch and folder drag-and-drop).
topbarTrailingGroupAria: Button cluster to the right of workspace tabs
